description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped rock with a rugged, angular form and a mix of dark gray and earthy brown coloration. The surface is pitted with small holes and indentations, giving it a weathered and natural appearance. Some faces are smoother while others are rougher, with visible textural variation and subtle layering. The rock appears dense and solid, with no visible fractures or major cracks. Its coloration suggests a composition of sedimentary or volcanic origin, possibly basalt or sandstone. The object would blend naturally into urban parks, roadside verges, or landscaped areas as a barrier or decorative element.
description: A rugged, angular rock with dark gray and brown hues, featuring pitted and weathered surfaces. Its dense, solid form and natural texture make it suitable for use as an urban barrier or landscape feature.
description_view_0: This view highlights a broad, dark gray face with several small pits and a slightly sloped surface.
description_view_1: This angle shows more of the brownish side, with a rougher, more porous texture and deeper indentations.
description_view_2: Here, the rock's top surface appears flatter and more uniform, with a mix of gray and brown tones and fewer visible pits.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the darker, more angular side, with pronounced edges and a generally smoother appearance compared to other sides.
attribute_location: urban park or landscaped roadside verge
